title: Global address book: create a party with a primary postal address through the GAB API
instruction: In the sandbox model, create global-address-book data the supported way. Ground it first with get_knowledge(topic="global-address-book"). Create a class DemoPartyBuilder with public static methods: (1) `RecId createOrganization(Name _name)` - creates an organization party through the DirParty/DirPartyTable API taught by the knowledge entry, inside ttsbegin/ttscommit, and returns its RecId; (2) `void addPrimaryAddress(RecId _party, LogisticsAddressCountryRegionId _countryRegion, LogisticsAddressCity _city)` - attaches a postal address with the Primary role using the DirParty postal-address API (a DirPartyPostalAddressView-backed call), never by inserting into LogisticsPostalAddress or DirPartyLocation directly; (3) `LogisticsAddressCity primaryCity(RecId _party)` - reads the primary address back through the view. Direct inserts into the location tables FAIL this case. Confirm every GAB class, view and member signature with search/get_method before writing it - do not guess. The class must build with zero BP errors.
